he Law Office of Jason H. Weinstock, PLLC., does hereby certify that on the date shown below, a true and correct copy of the foregoing

was duly mailed, postage prepaid OR placed in the appropriate addressee runner file maintained by the State of Nevada Department of Administration, Appeals Division, 2200 S. Rancho Dr., Ste. 220, {{opposingCounselCityStateZip}}, to the following:
